data.title: Mastercard is expected to report Q4 earnings of $4.24 per share with revenue around $8.78 billion. Quarterly dividend is raised to 87 cents per share and a $14 billion share repurchase program is announced.
data.description: Financial services company Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE: MA) is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings on Thursday, Jan. 29. Analysts are forecasting earnings of $4.24 per share, up from $3.82 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $8.78 billion, a significant increase from the previous year's $7.49 billion. In a recent announcement, Mastercard raised its quarterly cash dividend from 76 cents to 87 cents per share and launched a $14 billion share repurchase program. On Wednesday, Mastercard's stock closed at $521.37, experiencing a slight 0.2% gain. For more insights on the company's performance and latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Suominen Corporation reports unsatisfactory performance in challenging environment for Jan 1 - Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Suominen Corporation has reported its unaudited financial statements for the period of January 1 to December 31, 2025. The company's performance during this time frame has been deemed unsatisfactory, with challenges presented by the prevailing economic environment. Key financial metrics such as revenue, profit, and other important figures were below expectations, reflecting the tough conditions faced by the corporation. Despite efforts to navigate these difficulties, the results fell short of projections in a year marked by adversity. The company is now strategizing on how to improve its performance and regain financial stability in the future.

data.title: WatchMojo founder launches WatchMojo Studios with partners Granicus Entertainment and Mojo.tv at PRIMETIME, with initial $10 million backing.
data.description: During a gathering in Ottawa known as PRIMETIME, WatchMojo founder Ashkan Karbasfrooshan is revealing the next phase of the company's development. This includes the launch of WatchMojo Studios in collaboration with Granicus Entertainment and Mojo.tv. The project is supported by an initial investment of $10 million.

data.title: Thrive-GHP plans luxury senior living community with up to 600 units in Incheon, South Korea.
data.description: A new upscale senior living community is being developed in Incheon, South Korea by Thrive-GHP, a partnership between Thrive Senior Living from the U.S. and Korea's GHP. This project aims to create a luxury community with around 600 units.

data.title: Hilton Washington Dulles Airport to rebrand as DoubleTree by Hilton in January 2026, kicking off a new era for the property.
data.description: In a significant move signifying a new chapter for the property, the Hilton Washington Dulles Airport in HERNDON, Va., disclosed the commencement of its rebranding process. Effective from January 28, 2026, the hotel will undergo an official transition to DoubleTree by Hilton Washington Dulles Airport. This change marks the beginning of an exciting new era for the hotel, indicating a fresh start in its journey.

data.title: SightMD expands eye care in NY with 26 physicians named 2026 Castle Connolly Top Doctors, a national honor for excellence.
data.description: SightMD, a prominent multi-state network specializing in ophthalmology and eye care, has proudly shared that 26 of its physicians have been selected for the highly esteemed 2026 Castle Connolly Top Doctors® list. This national recognition honors exceptional physicians who demonstrate excellence in providing clinical care and professionalism.

data.title: Scott Equipment Company introduces new Round Silos for industrial & agricultural markets, durable mass-flow storage bins.
data.description: The latest product from Scott Equipment Company has been revealed as the new Round Silos. These fully welded dry bulk storage bins feature smooth-wall design and are built for strength, cleanliness, and reliable mass flow. The Round Silos cater to various industries including industrial, agricultural, feed, food processing, and recycling.

data.title: Adcom Designs introduces AI-Enabled Communication Labs, enhancing training with 45 years of experience.
data.description: A communication specialist firm in San Francisco, Adcom Designs, has embraced practice-based learning by introducing AI-Enabled Communication Labs. With 45 years of experience, the Bay Area-based company aims to deliver effective results through this new approach. The initiative was revealed on January 28, 2026.

data.title: World's first self-sealing balloon Belloballoon Plus launched internationally by burton + BURTON. Leading industry with exclusive US distribution.
data.description: One of the most prominent wholesale distributors of balloons and related gift items globally, burton + BURTON®, has introduced the innovative Belloballoon Plus®. This launch marks a significant development for burton + BURTON as it solidifies its position as the market leader in balloons and gifts. Serving as the exclusive distributor of Belloballoon Plus® in the USA, burton + BURTON continues to revolutionize the industry.

data.title: Wisper Internet expands to 22 Illinois cities, adding 22 new towers in seven months, reaching 20,000+ homes and businesses.
data.description: Today, Wisper Internet shared the news of the installation of over 22 new towers in Illinois over the last seven months. This expansion has facilitated the broadening of its high-speed internet services to reach over 20,000 residences and commercial establishments throughout the state. The initiative, announced from Mascoutah, Illinois on January 28, 2026, marks a significant step in enhancing internet connectivity in the region.

data.title: WJA plans new collaborations in 2026 to enhance leadership opportunities for women in jewelry industry.
data.description: In the year 2026, the Women's Jewelry Association (WJA) revealed a series of strategic partnerships and programs aimed at enhancing leadership opportunities, mentorship, and career growth for women within the jewelry and watch sectors. These initiatives highlight the organization's commitment to empowering women in the industry and fostering their professional development.

data.title: Dallas ISD Career Institute North rebuilt after tornado in 2019, named to 2025-26 Caudill Class, offering 16 career pathways.
data.description: Following a destructive tornado in 2019, the Dallas Independent School District completely transformed Career Institute North into a state-of-the-art career and technical education hub. This institution has been recognized with the esteemed Caudill Class distinction for outstanding Texas school architecture. Offering 16 distinct career pathways, this facility now stands as a beacon of excellence in education.
